channel.title: COHR — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on COHR (Coherent) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED COHR (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added COHR in Q4 2025 · 8.3% of portfolio. Building Coherent further — optical networking.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED COHR (+30%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added COHR in Q3 2025 · 6.8% of portfolio. Added to Coherent.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED COHR (+20%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added COHR in Q2 2025 · 5.3% of portfolio. First Coherent add.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: NEW POSITION COHR · Q4 2024
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) new position COHR in Q4 2024 · 4.5% of portfolio. New Coherent position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)
